name: brain-ecosystem
description: Brain Ecosystem — Self-learning MCP servers for Claude Code

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/brain-core && npm run build -w packages/brain && npm run build -w packages/trading-brain && npm run build -w packages/marketing-brain
scripts.release:tag: git tag -a v$(node -p "require('./packages/brain/package.json').version") -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./packages/brain/package.json').version")" && git push origin --tags

author: Tim Mecklenburg
